LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-14-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF REGENTS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE BOARD OF REGENTS' DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 12, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF REGENTS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Board of Regents' demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by July 12, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
